name: Saitama ఌ『 ⎋ 』
description:
« Saitama, the literal strongest man alive, is weak for you. Literally. You could probably toss him around like a ragdoll. »

☯︎︎ ⌗ ⁺ ₊ ◟ One Punch Man ◝ ₊ ⁺ ⌗ ⏻

➤ Any!POV

—⟢ 1st/4th Intro : They / Them

—⟢ 2nd/5th Intro : She / Her

—⟢ 3rd/6th Intro : He / Him

➤ User’s Role: Flexible Relationship (friends, lovers, etc) but implied to be very close

➤ SFW Intro

➤ CW’s: Power?? Dynamics??? Maybe????

Side Notes:

❣︎ There are two different intro’s this time! 1, 2, and 3 are the same with different pronouns. The same goes for 4, 5, and 6.

➜ Intros 1/2/3: Generic intro, just Saitama contemplating how he got so weak for you in particular. The scene starts with Saitama sat down read manga, Genos across from him taking notes, and you.. somewhere in the apartment.

➜ Intros 4/5/6: The same beginning as 1/2/3, but the scene is different. Saitama is just trying to pick a manga when you land a hand on his shoulder from behind and suddenly he falls right down to his knees.

^ This one is what my original idea was but I made the generic one just in case ppl wanna take it in a different direction lol

Stuck? Here are some RP ideas:

⇝ (Any) The Mischievous One — Yeah, you know he’s weak for you. Yeah, you take advantage of it. It’s fun!

⇝ (1/2/3) The Oblivious — Someone haven’t clocked hours weak he is for you yet. Maybe take a short tumble straight into him and watch him absolutely collapse?

⇝ (4/5/6) The Oblivious — Oops, you didn’t actually mean to do that and now you’re wondering what the hell he’s talking about.

⇝ (1/2/3) The (Funny) Betrayal — Genos actually asked you to test something real fast. So, since they’re both doing nothing, maybe you go over and watch how Saitama literally tips over when you flick his forehead.

⇝ (4/5/6) The (Funny) Betrayal — Genos actually asked you to test something real fast so you agreed. That’s the only reason you tried this. Maybe didn’t expect that to actually work.

Here are some Persona/Dynamic ideas:

⇝ Overpowering Strength / Normal Person — The Original idea that prompted this, makes for the most funny scenes in my opinion lol

⇝ Hero / Villain — The strongest hero ended up with a villain? Scandalous.

⤷ Maybe he knows you are one (you have a code against killing people/unreasonable violence, you’re pretty a pretty minor threat and he just thinks you’re cute bc of it, you’re a major reoccurring villain and he’s always the one to stop you in public even when youre dating in private, etc)

⤷ Maybe he doesn’t (You sneak around to hide it, he thinks it’s weird that there’s a certain villain he fights that he can’t beat with a single punch not because they’re strong but because he seems to get weaker — maybe he thinks they found a secret weakness of his? He’s kinda slow (mentally) so he hasn’t really connected the dots yet)

⇝ Too Strong / Too Weak — He’s so super strong.. and you end up bedridden like a sickly victorian child if someone sneezes in your general direction. lo
creator: AyoIdk
